_readme: SHARED lens tunables — the single source of truth for the personalisation lens, read by BOTH the web (docs/js/lens.js via fetch) and iOS (Feed/LensConfig.swift via a bundled resource; project.yml references ../docs/config/lens-config.json into the app + widget + test targets). Change a value HERE and both platforms follow. The lens ALGORITHM stays twinned in FeedCompiler.swift <-> lens.js and is frozen by tests/fixtures/feed-vectors; only these PARAMETERS live here. Regexes are deliberately NOT config (ICU vs ECMAScript dialect drift) — they are stable, vector-covered logic. Keep values byte-identical to what FeedCompiler.swift and tests/feed-vectors.test.js pinned before extraction.
